title: BlocksAlpha
description: Expands Minecraft’s creative palette with 750+ new blocks, providing extra concrete colors, stairs, slabs, fences, walls, luxury materials, gradients, quartz variants, and more. All versions supported from 1.12.2 to 1.21.4.
body: -BlocksAlpha is a Minecraft mod that adds a huge variety of new blocks to the game, giving you more ways to build, decorate, and customize your world. From an expanded selection of colored concrete to many other creative block types, this mod is perfect for builders who want more texture, color, and design options in their creations. With more updates, we will continue adding many more blocks to help you build and decorate. It adds concretes of many colors as well as fences, slabs, walls and stairs.
